raw_consumer_statement:
I am submitting this complaint against American Express for its failure to properly investigate and resolve a dispute concerning unauthorized charges made by XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. 

XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX improperly charged my American Express account XXXX  of dollars by falsely claiming I failed to return a rental car on time. I extended the rental in full compliance with their procedures through multiple documented calls to their XXXX  call centers, where I was expressly told I would be billed the regular daily rate. Despite this, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX later alleged a repossession and claimed to have sent me notice of such. I never received any such notice, and no proof of certified or signed delivery has ever been provided. 

I disputed these charges with American Express under the Fair Credit Billing Act ( XXXXCBA ). However, American Express has failed to take corrective action, leaving me responsible for charges that were neither valid nor authorized. 

Car Rental happened in XXXX. 
Amounts in question : {$390.00} {$360.00} {$160.00} {$140.00} {$73.00}
